title: maytenus puberula
intro: Maytenus puberula, also known as the "Palo Blanco" or "Mayten", is a plant species in the Celastraceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Maytenus puberula include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can be used in traditional herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory infections and digestive issues.
